business.name: Riverside Family Dental
business.tagline: Where your family's smile comes first. Vancouver's trusted neighbourhood dental clinic.
business.description: Riverside Family Dental provides comprehensive dental care for all ages. From children's first visits to senior care, we offer preventive, restorative, and cosmetic services in a welcoming, modern clinic.
business.address: 2450 Marine Dr, North Vancouver, BC V7P 1S2

hero.headline: Dental care that feels like family.
hero.subheadline: Preventive, restorative, and cosmetic dentistry for every age. Serving North Vancouver with care and expertise.

services.name: Family Dentistry
services.description: Checkups, cleanings, and preventive care for every member of your family. We make kids feel at ease.

services.name: Restorative & Implants
services.description: Fillings, crowns, bridges, dentures, and dental implants to restore your smile and confidence.

services.name: Cosmetic & Whitening
services.description: Teeth whitening, veneers, and Invisalign. Complimentary cosmetic consultations available.

insurance.accepted: We direct-bill most insurance plans. Canadian Dental Care Plan (CDCP) and provincial programs welcome.
insurance.payment: Payment plans and estimates provided. No surprise fees — we discuss costs before treatment.

about.headline: Your smile is in good hands.
about.body: Riverside Family Dental has been part of the North Vancouver community for over a decade. We combine advanced technology with a gentle, person-centred approach so every visit is comfortable and effective.

testimonials.author: Mike T.
testimonials.quote: Best dental experience I've had. They took time to explain my options and never pushed unnecessary work.

testimonials.author: Priya S.
testimonials.quote: My kids used to dread the dentist. Now they ask when we're going back. That says it all.

testimonials.author: James W.
testimonials.quote: Had implants done here. Professional, painless, and my smile looks better than ever.

seo.title: Riverside Family Dental | Family & Cosmetic Dentistry North Vancouver | New Patients Welcome
seo.description: Riverside Family Dental in North Vancouver — family dentistry, restorative care, and cosmetic services. CDCP accepted. Book your appointment today.
